proof: group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, G.1) = group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, a) != (H.1 = f.hom(a))
group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, G.1) = group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, a) = (H.1 = f.hom(a))
monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, M.1) = monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, a) != (N.1 = f.hom(a))
monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, M.1) = monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, a) = (N.1 = f.hom(a))
add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, A.0) = add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a) != (B.0 = f.hom(a))
add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, A.0) = add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a) = (B.0 = f.hom(a))
add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, A.0) = add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a) != (B.0 = f.hom(a))
add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, A.0) = add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a) = (B.0 = f.hom(a))
semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, S.0) = semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, a) != (T.0 = f.hom(a))
semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, S.0) = semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, a) = (T.0 = f.hom(a))
ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, R.0) = ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, a) != (S.0 = f.hom(a))
ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, R.0) = ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, a) = (S.0 = f.hom(a))
